items.title: More Reliable Sharing Errors
items.description: Sharing now keeps specific messages for missing users and people who are already members, making failed invites easier to understand.

items.title: Safer Data Migration
items.description: Local lists are kept available if cloud migration only partially succeeds, so the app can retry without losing local data.

items.title: List Detail Stability
items.description: List detail screens now clean up live subscriptions correctly and avoid duplicate listeners after rebuilds.

items.title: Quality And Correctness Updates
items.description: Improved Firestore result handling, shared member counts, create-list success messages, and regression coverage.
